title: My Name Is Loh Kiwan
posterAlt: My Name Is Loh Kiwan (2024) movie poster
tmdbOverview: After defecting from North Korea, Loh Kiwan struggles to obtain refugee status in Belgium, where he encounters a dejected woman who has lost all hope.
synopsis: My Name Is Loh Kiwan is a 2024 romance, drama and k-drama film from South Korea. It carries a 6.7 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
